branchAdministration.dialogDescription: This changes the branch record only. Commercial terms and access status are managed from branch subscriptions.

clinicGroups.title: Clinic groups
clinicGroups.description: Company-level tenants. Branch subscriptions, billing, and access controls are managed per branch.

clinicGroups.dialogDescription: Company-level details live here. Branch pricing, access, and invoices are managed from branch workbenches.
clinicGroups.provisionDescription: Create a manager, branch manager, doctor, or secretary under the selected clinic group. The temporary password must be changed on first login.
clinicGroups.tenantBoundaryTitle: Company groups own people and patients.
clinicGroups.tenantBoundaryDescription: Branches remain the subscribed client units for profiles, pricing, access blocks, invoices, and collections.
clinicGroups.searchPlaceholder: Search company, slug, note, or ID...
clinicGroups.companyRecordHint: Company identity only. Branch subscriptions and billing stay per branch.
clinicGroups.noFilteredClinics: No company groups match these filters.

readiness.readyHelper: Next-month branch setup is in place.

branchSubscriptions.title: Branch subscriptions
branchSubscriptions.description: Platform workbench for branch access, profile availability, and commercial terms.
branchSubscriptions.changeReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this change is being made.
branchSubscriptions.changeReasonHint: This reason is saved with the admin action payload for audit review.

review.accessDescription: Access changes affect whether branch users can make mutating clinic updates.
review.suspendWarning: Read-only access blocks mutating clinic actions while preserving login and viewing access.
review.profilesDescription: Profile changes affect available branch workflows and the fixed fee multiplier.
review.profilesWarning: Profile availability changes apply to this branch after saving. Review operational impact before confirming.
review.pricingDescription: Pricing changes are scheduled for the next billing month and affect future invoice calculations.
review.pricingWarning: Invoice generation will use these terms when the effective month is reached.

branchSubscriptions.selectClinicNotice: Select a clinic in the platform admin top bar to manage its branch subscriptions.
branchSubscriptions.selectBranchReviewPricing: Select a branch to review pricing terms.
branchSubscriptions.noManagePermission: You can view branch subscriptions, but you do not have permission to change them.
branchSubscriptions.flexiblePlanDescription: Set the base branch fee, monthly visit allowance, and required overage blocks.
branchSubscriptions.capacityPackageDescription: Name the package, set its package fee and included visit capacity, then optionally define overage blocks.
branchSubscriptions.capacityOverageOptionalNotice: Leave both overage fields empty if this package has no overage billing. If one is entered, both are required.
branchSubscriptions.pricingRequiredNotice: Complete the required fields for the selected pricing model before saving.
branchSubscriptions.readOnlyNotice: Read-only blocks mutating clinic actions while preserving login and viewing access.
branchSubscriptions.fixedFeeRule: First profile is 1.0x fixed fee; each extra enabled profile adds 0.5x.
branchSubscriptions.selectProfileBeforeSaving: Select at least one enabled profile before saving.

platformBilling.title: Platform billing
platformBilling.description: Generate branch invoice packages, review usage, and record offline collections.
platformBilling.selectClinicNotice: Select a clinic in the top bar to manage platform billing.
platformBilling.selectBranchMonthPreview: Select a branch and month to preview billing.
platformBilling.activeInvoiceNotice: This branch-month already has an active invoice package. Use invoice detail to download artifacts or record collections.
platformBilling.generationNotice: Generation locks this branch-month and creates the invoice PDF plus the Excel data sheet.
platformBilling.noInvoices: No platform invoices for this branch-month.
platformBilling.selectInvoice: Select an invoice to view details.
platformBilling.noUsageLines: No usage lines were captured on this invoice.
platformBilling.previewFailed: Billing preview could not be generated for this branch-month.
platformBilling.voidLockedNotice: Void is locked after collection records exist.
platformBilling.noBillableVisits: No billable visits are logged for this branch-month.

not_ready.label: Not ready
not_ready.description: Select the clinic, branch, and billing month before generating a preview.

ready_to_preview.label: Ready to preview
ready_to_preview.description: The branch-month is selected. Generate or refresh the preview before issuing artifacts.

preview_generated.label: Preview generated
preview_generated.description: Usage and pricing are visible for review. Adjustments can still be added before issuing.

invoice_generated.label: Invoice generated
invoice_generated.description: The PDF and data workbook exist, and the branch-month is locked.

partially_collected.label: Partially collected
partially_collected.description: At least one offline collection has been recorded and a balance remains.

paid.label: Paid
paid.description: The invoice balance is fully collected.

voided.label: Voided
voided.description: This invoice is cancelled and kept only as billing history.

adjustmentDialog.title: Record adjustment
adjustmentDialog.description: Use positive amounts for extra charges and negative amounts for credits.

collectionDialog.title: Record collection
collectionDialog.description: Track the offline payment after the money is collected.
collectionDialog.exceedsBalance: Collection amount cannot exceed the remaining balance.

voidDialog.title: Void invoice
voidDialog.description: Voiding releases the branch-month lock only when no collections exist.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.utilizationFootnote: Updates in real-time based on in-progress sessions.

patients.addBalanceSimpleHint: Use this when the patient pays toward package sessions.
patients.increaseRemainingAmountHint: Use this when there is still an unpaid amount in the package.
patients.correctBalanceHint: Use this only to correct the current displayed balance.

patients.noExistingPatientMatches: No matching company patients available for this branch.
patients.removeBranchRelationshipDescription: The patient will no longer appear in this branch. Their company patient record and other branch relationships will remain unchanged.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.cancelConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel this session? This action cannot be undone.
sessions.reassessmentDescription: How many sessions until this patient is due for their next reassessment? Leave empty or set to 0 if no future reassessment is needed.
sessions.reassessmentDueDescription: This patient is due for a reassessment. Are you sure you want to create a regular session instead of an assessment session?
sessions.initReassessmentDescription: This is an assessment session. How many sessions until this patient is due for their next reassessment? Leave empty to skip tracking.
sessions.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
sessions.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this session?

sessions.packageCostPositive: Package session cost must be greater than 0.
sessions.packageInsufficientBalance: Patient does not have enough balance for this package session.
sessions.assessmentDoctorRestriction: Assessment and reassessment sessions have doctor assignment restrictions.

sessions.assessmentCategoryForcesAssessment: Category {{categoryName}} is treated as an assessment session.
sessions.reassessmentDoctorRestriction: Only the assigned doctor can create this reassessment session.
sessions.reassessmentLockedDoctorHint: This reassessment is locked to Dr. {{doctorName}}.
sessions.crossBranchContext: This session was served in {{serviceBranch}} while the patient primary branch is {{primaryBranch}}.

hero.eyebrow: A clearer public front door for the Recovera platform
hero.title: Manage patients, teams, billing, and growth from one subscription-based system.
hero.description: Recovera helps clinics run daily operations, track payments, coordinate staff, and choose the plan that fits them now, from a free starter workspace to a private hosted deployment.

stats.label: Cloud access for teams and owners
Plans from launch to private hosting
Unified workspace for clinics and staff

preview.title: Everything a modern clinic needs

metrics.label: Active patients
metrics.description: Patient records, histories, and daily follow-up stay visible to the right people.

metrics.label: Sessions today
metrics.description: Stay ahead of schedules, patient workloads, and team coordination.

highlights.label: Reports
highlights.description: Fast visibility for owners and admins

preview.calloutTitle: Want the system on your own hosted environment?
preview.calloutDescription: Choose the dedicated hosted plan for isolated infrastructure, branding control, and a tailored rollout.

features.title: The basics a subscription-based management system should communicate immediately
features.description: The homepage explains what the product manages, how teams use it, how subscriptions scale, and what changes when a customer wants a private hosted system instead of the shared service.

cards.title: Operational control
cards.description: Track daily work, appointments, session follow-ups, and clinic activity from a single shared dashboard.

cards.title: Billing and subscriptions
cards.description: Support recurring subscriptions with clear plan tiers, payment visibility, and an upgrade path as clinics grow.

cards.title: Roles and accountability
cards.description: Protect the system with permissions, activity logs, and clear role boundaries for admins, doctors, and staff.

cards.title: Reporting that matters
cards.description: Turn operations into decisions with balances, performance reporting, and fast visibility into clinic health.

workflow.title: A simple story from starter plan to dedicated deployment
workflow.description: The buying journey is clear: launch quickly, upgrade when the team expands, and switch to a private hosted version when the customer needs their own environment.
workflow.hostedCardTitle: Own infrastructure when you need it
workflow.hostedCardDescription: This special plan is positioned as a service handoff: dedicated hosting, migration help, custom rollout, and a private environment instead of the shared subscription platform.

steps.title: Launch on the Free plan
steps.description: Start with the essentials, onboard a small team, and validate your workflow before you spend more.

steps.title: Scale with Standard or Premium
steps.description: Unlock more staff capacity, richer reports, and stronger controls as the clinic operation becomes more demanding.

steps.title: Move to a dedicated hosted system
steps.description: When you need isolation, custom hosting, or a branded deployment, Recovera can run in its own private environment.

plans.title: Hybrid pricing that scales with your clinic
plans.description: Each subscription combines a base platform fee with active practitioner seats and branch count. Optional usage add-ons apply only to higher-cost services such as SMS reminders, AI features, or external integrations.
plans.note: Example pricing shown in EGP. Final numbers can be tuned per market.

items.name: Core
items.summary: For new clinics that need core workflows and a simple starting footprint.
points: Core workflows: patients, sessions, and basic billing

items.name: Growth
items.summary: For active clinics scaling operations with stronger controls and reporting.

items.name: Scale
items.summary: For multi-branch organizations that need deeper governance and performance visibility.
points: Executive analytics, audit depth, and workflow automation

items.name: Private Hosted System
items.summary: For organizations that require dedicated infrastructure with the same hybrid model (platform + seats + branches).

hosted.title: For customers who want their own hosted Recovera system
hosted.description: Not every client wants a shared subscription. This offer gives larger clinics or organizations a dedicated environment, their own hosted deployment, and a more tailored implementation path.
benefits: Single-tenant hosting for clients who want full separation from the shared service
A tailored environment for compliance, branding, or internal infrastructure preferences
Deployment planning, onboarding, and operational handoff for larger organizations
hosted.bestFitText: Multi-branch clinics, healthcare groups, and organizations that need deeper ownership over infrastructure and rollout.

sessions.assessmentDoctorRestricted: Selected doctor cannot be assigned to assessment or reassessment sessions.
sessions.timeRange: Session time must be a whole hour between 10:00 and 24:00
sessions.slotConflict: Cannot move this session. The doctor already has two sessions in this time slot.

profileDetails.title: Profile details
profileDetails.empty: Select a clinic profile to review its details.
